component.name: UrlHistoryItem
component.script:
sub init() m.bg = m.top.findNode("itemBg") m.label = m.top.findNode("itemLabel") end sub
sub onItemContentChange() content = m.top.itemContent if type(content) = "roInvalid" then return m.label.text = content.title end sub
sub onFocusChange() if m.top.focusPercent > 0.5 m.bg.color = "0x1A1A50FF" m.label.color = "0x00FFFFFF" else m.bg.color = "0x0D0D28FF" m.label.color = "0x8080C0FF" end if end sub
